text.message: Red we could work together or we can be greedy
Look at the board, look how much wood there is
there is a 5, a 6, a 4, an 8 wood, and there is little brick
Okay well blue isn’t trading and black has brick
no sir, you are supposed to rob and block the leader, if you dont, I will not trade anything with you
asking 2 of the rarest mats, on your turn
Black you will win but black will win by default
why did you embargo me lol
we are all tied, i don't even have a city
no, orange, you dont get the notion of scarcity
reporting you orange for feeding red
I think it is just that orange doesnt understand the game? maybe
bro you talking all this smack, all game
and you call me out. smh
you gifted this game to red
I’m trying to work with you
But you won’t let me dev
but he didnt, I didnt trade orange, despite me explaining that it was in his best interest to trade
Sure would be nice to block
yeah orange, you have to realize that a brick is worth 2 cards, even 3 cards in this map
